content_body: Had an awesome time. We went to Vogel Falls, Dahlonega to have lunch and do a little shopping. Then we went to Dawsonville for breakfast and more shopping. On our last day, we're going to hike to The Swinging Bridge. Saw deer on the side yard this morning. So cool! We enjoyed evenings by the fire, fishing, shopping, exploring, walks, and hiking. Beautiful location for a cabin. Very serene! Thank you!
title: Wonderful Stay Spent Exploring
